# 📊  Don't miss these metrics!

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-09-23 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 120

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Alright, so you've got Google Analytics set up properly on your
website with MonsterInsights.

Hurray 🥳!

Now what??

To really take advantage of Google Analytics, you should have a
list of metrics or reports that you check often.

When you're keeping an eye on certain numbers and taking note of
any changes, you can figure out what needs to be fixed or
improved on your site (or in your marketing strategy).

But what are the most important metrics to track?

Check this out:

👉 Top 11 Most Important Google Analytics Metrics to Track 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..59yDxGoaGIS18NxSrx_6n2DTs2hcUZ9bXrHrHKWzs2s )
 👈

Do NOT skip #6 - it gives you so much valuable SEO insights...

Start measuring and increasing your traffic today!

Talk soon,

Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator
